name: Chinatown
description: Historic district with food streets, temples and easy evening walks
notes: Good for dinner, desserts and low-effort wandering.

name: Maxwell Food Centre
description: Famous hawker centre known for chicken rice and classic local stalls
notes: Best used for a casual first-night dinner.

name: Merlion Park
description: Iconic Singapore photo stop on the Marina Bay waterfront
notes: Quick stop; best paired with a Marina Bay walk.

name: Marina Bay
description: Iconic waterfront skyline walk
notes: Best at sunset/night; easy loop with MBS and Gardens.

name: Helix Bridge
description: Scenic pedestrian bridge linking the bayfront highlights
notes: Short photo stop between Merlion/Marina Bay and MBS.

name: The Shoppes at Marina Bay Sands
description: Luxury mall with dining, AC break and easy access to Gardens
notes: Good lunch stop before heading to Gardens by the Bay.

name: Gardens by the Bay
description: Signature garden attraction with Supertrees and waterfront paths
notes: Works best from late afternoon into evening.

name: Telok Ayer
description: Compact dining and bar area near Chinatown for an easy evening
notes: Good backup dinner area after spa day.

name: Hua Yu Wee Seafood Restaurant
description: Heritage seafood restaurant known for saucy chilli crab
notes: Heritage seafood; saucy chilli crab.

name: New Station Snack Bar
description: Old-school local eatery known for mama chicken and comfort food
notes: Try the mama chicken.

name: Tian Tian Hainanese Chicken Rice
description: Famous Maxwell stall for classic Hainanese chicken rice
notes: Very popular chicken rice stall in Maxwell.

name: Ah Tai Hainanese Chicken Rice
description: Popular Maxwell alternative for Hainanese chicken rice
notes: Good Maxwell alternative to Tian Tian.

name: Samy's Curry Restaurant
description: Institution for South Indian curry meals, often served on banana leaf
notes: Classic curry house.

name: Green Heart
description: Lush indoor-outdoor garden courtyard at Marina One
notes: Really nice garden; good light stop, not a full attraction.

name: Incloud Teahouse
description: Modern tea spot for a calm drink break
notes: Tea/coffee stop.

name: Tiong Bahru Bakery
description: Popular bakery cafe for breakfast, pastries and coffee
notes: Good breakfast stop.

name: Yunomori Onsen & Spa
description: Japanese-style onsen and spa for a slow wellness half-day
notes: Best used as a half-day spa stop.

name: Garden by the Bay Light Show Spot
description: Best area to catch the Supertree light show in the gardens
notes: Best view for the evening light show.

name: Yat Ka Yan Dessert (Fortune Centre)
description: Dessert shop for Hong Kong-style sweets and after-dinner stop
notes: Dessert stop.

name: ICE&TIME
description: Dessert spot known for kakigori and icy sweets
notes: Good for shaved ice / kakigori.

name: Un-Yang-Kor-Dai Singapore
description: Dessert/cafe stop for Thai-style sweets and drinks
notes: Dessert stop.

name: 75 Ah Balling Peanut Soup (Chinatown)
description: Traditional dessert stall for peanut soup and local sweets
notes: Try the peanut soup.

name: Spot for Pictures at the Trees
description: Photo spot around the Supertrees in Gardens by the Bay
notes: Good dedicated photo stop around the Supertree area.

name: The Robertson House by The Crest Collection
description: Our house
notes: Good base for Chinatown / Marina Bay / airport transfer days

name: Flower Dome
description: Garden
notes: Gigantic air-conditioned glass greenhouse
